name: GitHub PR Auto-Review → Slack Notification
description: Automatically reviews new GitHub pull requests using an LLM and posts the review summary to Slack for team visibility.

required_secrets.description: GitHub PAT with repo and pull_requests:write scopes
LLM provider API key for review generation
Slack bot token with chat:write scope

replacements.config_delta: Replace CHANNEL with TO (reviewer distribution list), SUBJECT (e.g. 'PR Review Ready'), BODY. Required secret: google/gmail_oauth_token instead of slack/bot_token. Use when reviewers prefer asynchronous email over Slack pings.
